## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- Browser (if UI-related): [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]

## Additional Context

Logs, screenshots, or other details that might help.
